'''âsh-v-j-sh''' ('''kashavjeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbase|imbase]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbase|imbase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-v-j-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashavjeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishavjeshoko|thishavjeshoko]] || [[word:jishavjeshoko|jishavjeshoko]] || [[word:shishavjeshoko|shishavjeshoko]] || [[word:kishavjeshoko|kishavjeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushavjeshoko|thuthushavjeshoko]] || [[word:jujushavjeshoko|jujushavjeshoko]] || [[word:shushushavjeshoko|shushushavjeshoko]] || [[word:kukushavjeshoko|kukushavjeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshavjeshoko|thoshavjeshoko]] || [[word:joshavjeshoko|joshavjeshoko]] || [[word:shoshavjeshoko|shoshavjeshoko]] || [[word:koshavjeshoko|koshavjeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshavjeshoko|thĂŠshavjeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshavjeshoko|jĂŠshavjeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshavjeshoko|shĂŠshavjeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshavjeshoko|kĂŠshavjeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashavjeshoko|thashavjeshoko]] || [[word:jashavjeshoko|jashavjeshoko]] || [[word:shashavjeshoko|shashavjeshoko]] || [[word:kashavjeshoko|kashavjeshoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
